name: Co-parent conflict
description: User is navigating difficult coparenting communication

reflection.situation: My ex and I have been coparenting for two years. Lately they've been ignoring my messages about our kid's schedule and making unilateral decisions.
reflection.interpretation: They're treating me like I don't matter in our child's life
reflection.needs: To be included in decisions, to have clear communication, to coparent effectively
reflection.fears: That this will escalate and hurt our child
reflection.desired_outcome: A workable coparenting arrangement with mutual respect
reflection.message_draft: We need to get on the same page about our kid's schedule

expected_tone.emotional_summary: Practical, focused on the child. Doesn't assign blame broadly.
expected_tone.avoid_saying: No therapy language, no predicting their character
